name: pg-aiguide
description:
AI-optimized PostgreSQL expertise for coding assistants. pg-aiguide helps AI coding tools write dramatically better PostgreSQL code. 

It provides:
- Semantic search across the official PostgreSQL manual (version-aware)
- AI-optimized “skills” available through MCP tools — curated, opinionated Postgres best practices used automatically by AI agents
- Extension ecosystem docs, starting with TimescaleDB, with more coming soon
